title: limonium anglicum
intro: Limonium anglicum, also known as sea lavender, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium anglicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of sea lavender typically involve infusions, essential oils, or tinctures that can be used topically or internally, depending on the desired application.
